chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3771 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.15832/2020 (Exemption) 3. For order on CMA No.15833/2020 (Stay) 4. For order on CMA No.15834/2020 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 30.10.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2020, which is over five years ago. It was first taken up on 17.12.2021, which is almost four years ago, when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. In the last almost four years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, once again, none present for the petitioner without intimation despite the name of the petitioner appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this five years old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
